name: Dodge & Weave
short_description: Dodge & Weave is a bullet hell survival game. You must avoid getting hit by any projectiles in order to complete your objective and win each level.
detailed_description: Dodge & Weave is a bullet hell survival game. You must avoid getting hit by any projectiles in order to complete your objective and win each level. Each level has a different gimmick behind it. Some levels may be top down perspective, survive for 60 seconds, while the projectiles are extremely fast. Others may be a 3D platformer challenge. This game will challenge your reflex abilities and enhance your cognitive skills in order to complete each level. Aim for high scores. Get your win counts as high as you can. Survive the challenges thrown at you and be the best Dodger and Weaver that you can be.
